title: Sudan Black Staining of Zebrafish Larvae
author: Emily Rosowski
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rced2te

steps.instruction: 1. Anesthetize larvae with Tricaine. 2. Transfer to 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Make fresh 4% formaldehyde in PBS
steps.instruction: Make fresh 4% formaldehyde in PBS: 1 ml 16% formaldehyde 400 μl 10x PBS 2.6 ml H 2 O

steps.title: Pipet as much liquid off of...
steps.instruction: Pipet as much liquid off of larvae in tubes as possible.

steps.title: Cover in aluminum foil, rock at 4°C overnight
steps.instruction: Cover in aluminum foil, rock at 4°C overnight.

steps.title: Wash larvae in 1 ml 1x...
steps.instruction: Wash larvae in 1 ml 1x PBS, >5 min, rocking at 4°C.

steps.title: Repeat for a total of 3 washes
steps.instruction: Repeat for a total of 3 washes.

steps.title: Pipet as much PBS as possible...
steps.instruction: Pipet as much PBS as possible off of larvae, add 1 ml working solution of Sudan Black B (see Guidelines- Before you start).

steps.title: Cover in aluminum foil, rock at RT for 1 hour
steps.instruction: Cover in aluminum foil, rock at RT for 1 hour.

steps.title: Wash larvae in 1 ml 70%...
steps.instruction: Wash larvae in 1 ml 70% ethanol, 5 min, rocking at RT.

steps.title: Repeat for a total of 3 washes
steps.instruction: Repeat for a total of 3 washes.

steps.title: Rehydrate larvae by washing in PBS-Tween,...
steps.instruction: Rehydrate larvae by washing in PBS-Tween, 5 min, rocking at RT.

steps.title: Pipet as much PBS-Tween as possible...
steps.instruction: Pipet as much PBS-Tween as possible off larvae, add 1 ml Depigmentation solution: 400 μl 10% KOH 133 μl 30% H 2 O 2 3.467 ml H 2 O

steps.title: Take out a few larvae from...
steps.instruction: Take out a few larvae from tube, check depigmentation under a zoomscope. Pigment should be mostly lost, and sudan black signal should remain.

steps.title: Wash larvae in 1 ml PBS-Tween,...
steps.instruction: Wash larvae in 1 ml PBS-Tween, 5 min, rocking at RT.

steps.title: Repeat for a total of 2 washes
steps.instruction: Repeat for a total of 2 washes.

steps.title: Store at 4ºC
steps.instruction: Store at 4ºC. For longer-term storage change liquid to 1x PBS (no Tween).
